name: etechflow/module-shipping-table-rates
description: Flexible shipping table rates for Magento 2 with a visual rule builder, live cart simulator, versioned rate sets, conflict detection, native MSI, and Hyvä support. Designed to be the merchant-friendly alternative to Amasty / MageWorx Shipping Table Rates.

suggest.hyva-themes/magento2-default-theme: Hyvä Theme support is built in.
suggest.etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility: Pair with Next Day Eligibility for stock-aware shipping rules layered on top of the table rates.
suggest.etechflow/module-backorder-eta-display: Pair with Backorder ETA Display to tell customers when backorder items will arrive.
